# resetDefaultInputValues()

**Instance Method**

Clears all previously set default values for composition input parameters.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func resetDefaultInputValues()
```

## Discussion

This method resets the defaults that were set with the method [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCCompositionPickerView/setDefaultValue(_:forInputKey:)].

## Setting Composition Input Parameters

- **setDefaultValue(_:forInputKey:)**: Sets the default value to use for a composition input parameter.
